title: September 28
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 28''' is the 271st day of the year (272nd in leap years). There are 94 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1926|1926]] – [[Bernard Behrens]] is born.
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Jim Henshaw]] is born.
*[[1950s#1956|1956]] – [[Kiran Shah]] is born.
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[Greg Weisman]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[R. K. Post]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Jo Wyatt]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 15|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 15]] published.
*[[1985]] – "[[A Race to the Finish]]" of [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars Droids'']] and "[[To Save Deej]]" of [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] air on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*1985 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 119|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 119]] published.
*[[2004]] – ''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – [[X-Wing: Rogue Leader 1|''X-Wing: Rogue Leader'' 1]] published.
*[[2006]] – ''[[What's The Story?]]'' Round 7 published in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]].
*[[2010]] – [[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)|''The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force'']] published.
*[[2012]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars''{{'}}]] [[The Clone Wars: Season Five|fifth season]] premieres on [[Wikipedia:Teletoon (Canadian TV channel)|Teletoon]] with [[Revival (episode)|"Revival"]].
*[[2016]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 23|''Star Wars'' (2015) 23]] published.
*[[2017]] – ''[[Zeb to the Rescue]]'' hardcover published.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars: I Wish I Had a Wookiee]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[The Odyssey of Star Wars: An Epic Poem]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars Rebels, Vol. 2]]'' published in the United States.
*2021 – "[[Star Wars Inside Intel|''Star Wars'' Inside Intel: Twi'lek Culture]]" published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2022]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 24|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 24]] published.
*2022 – [[Han Solo & Chewbacca 6|''Han Solo & Chewbacca'' 6]] published.
*2022 – "[[Aldhani (episode)|Aldhani]]" of ''[[Star Wars: Andor]]'' released on [[Disney+]].
*[[2023]] – ''[[The Ultimate Star Wars Quiz Book]]'' published.
*2023 – [[Star Wars: Galactic Starcruiser|''Star Wars'': Galactic Starcruiser]] closes.

<noinclude>
